title: Phishing
body: Phishing attacks trick users into revealing sensitive information through fake emails or websites.

title: SQL Injection
body: SQL injection is a vulnerability that allows attackers to manipulate database queries.

title: Cross Site Scripting
body: XSS allows attackers to inject malicious scripts into web pages.

title: Gayathri RAG Test
body: The public RAG verification marker for Gayathri's chatbot system is BLUE-RAG-2026.

title: SNTI AI Assistant
body: SNTI AI Assistant is a Streamlit chatbot that supports chat, search, charts, big data, images, apps, research, coding, and custom GPT tools.

title: SNTI Navigation
body: The SNTI AI Assistant has pages for Chat, Search, Charts, Big Data, Images, Apps, Research, Codex, and GPTs. Users can switch pages using the left sidebar icons.

title: Supported File Uploads
body: The chatbot supports text, PDF, DOCX, CSV, JSON, and image uploads depending on the selected page. Chat supports TXT, PDF, and DOCX files. Charts supports CSV and PDF files. Images supports PNG, JPG, and JPEG files.

title: Authentication
body: The SNTI AI Assistant uses a Streamlit login screen. Users must sign in before accessing the app. Authentication is handled by auth.py and user credentials are configured in .streamlit/secrets.toml.

title: RAG Knowledge Base
body: The chatbot uses Retrieval-Augmented Generation, also called RAG, to answer questions from local JSON knowledge files. The main knowledge file is data/docs.json.

title: Models
body: The SNTI AI Assistant allows users to choose between Llama and Gemini models. Llama responses are generated through Groq, while Gemini responses are generated through Google Generative AI.
